what: Implement RenameProject command that updates only Project.name and updatedAt while preserving Project.path immutability and existing archive state.

where.description: Create rename command type and handler using domain rename operation.
Add tests for valid rename and invalid-name rejection.
Expose strict rename behavior if not already present.

acceptance.given: An existing project and a valid new name
acceptance.then: Project name changes, updatedAt changes, and path remains exactly unchanged.

acceptance.given: A rename request with name length 0 after trim
acceptance.then: The command fails with validation error and no persistence update occurs.

context: Users need editable display naming without compromising repository binding rules.
technicalNotes: Keep command narrow and explicit; do not add generic update command. Merge-safe: rename command/tests only. Models: Codex gpt-5.1-codex (low), Claude Haiku 4.5 (low).
